text:
Once upon a time, there was a young man named Leo who lived near a quiet creek. Every evening, he would go there to watch the sunset, a sight that always made him feel peaceful. His favorite spot was a old oak tree near the water's edge.

One evening, as Leo sat enjoying the calming colors of orange and pink, he noticed something unusual—a duckling with an unusual glimmer in its eye. This duckling didn't fit in anywhere, just meandering around slowly.

Feeling somewhat lonely himself, Leo decided to approach the duckling. To his astonishment, it spoke. The duckling's voice was soft but clear. "Where am I?" it asked.

"We've never seen a duck like you here. Maybe you're lost?" Leo guessed.

The duckling tilted its head, quacking softly. "Could I stay?"
